name: Garage Golf Cincy
address: 4242 Mt Carmel Tobasco Rd, Cincinnati, OH 45255
about: Garage Golf Cincy is an indoor golf simulator venue offering a casual, entertainment-focused experience. The facility features four state-of-the-art golf simulator bays powered by Trackman technology, complete with 8-foot video boards, TVs, and premium sound systems. It operates on a pay-by-hour model with peak and off-peak rates, offering memberships and leagues for regular patrons. The venue combines golfing with a relaxed atmosphere, including a custom-built putting green, arcade games, and a food and drink menu, positioning itself as a 'hangout' spot for both golfers and social groups.
why_golfers_like_it: Four bays equipped with high-end Trackman simulators and large screens
Unique 'man cave' atmosphere with a custom putting green and arcade games
Flexible pricing with off-peak rates and membership options available
Social atmosphere suitable for both focused practice and group events

food_and_drink.notes: Pizza, soft pretzels, hot dogs, bagged snacks

simulator_hardware.notes: Four bays with 8-foot video boards, TVs, and premium sound systems

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted inside the golf simulator bays. The venue offers 'Bites & Beers' including pizza, pretzels, hot dogs, and various drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for an 18-hole round, as it depends on player pace and simulator settings.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children are welcome but must be supervised; no children under 10 are allowed without a non-golfing adult present.
